title: How to Request a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Step 1: Log in to the company intranet using your employee credentials. Step 2: Navigate to the 'IT Helpdesk' section, which can usually be found in the main menu. Step 3: Click on 'Hardware Requests' or a similar option. Step 4: Fill out the request form with the necessary details, including your name, department, and the specific hardware you need (e.g., laptop model or type of peripheral). Step 5: If applicable, provide a justification for your request, such as project requirements or replacement of faulty equipment. Step 6: Review your request for accuracy. Step 7: Submit the form. Step 8: You will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number for your request. Step 9: If you do not receive a response within 3-5 business days, please follow up with the IT Helpdesk via email or phone. Remember to check the company policy regarding hardware requests for any specific guidelines or limitations.
